permits.description: Convert existing two family home to single family. 1st floor remodel existing kitchen bath. 2nd floor- remodel existing bath & add new bath, cancel existing kitchen. Insulate attic. Remodel front porch.
permits.score_reasons: keyword: remodel; permit completed; all permits completed

llm_assessment.reasoning: The property is undergoing a comprehensive conversion from a two-family to a single-family home including a kitchen remodel and updates to three bathrooms, representing significant whole-house work indicative of sale preparation despite long-term owner occupancy.
